banner.text: NORTH MIAMI BEACH LAUNCH // NOW ACCEPTING EARLY SIGNUPS

hero.headline: CLEARSCOPE IS TAKING APPOINTMENTS.
hero.subhead: $149 sewer camera inspections. No repairs. No agenda. Just video proof of what's in your pipes.
hero.body: We send a camera through your sewer line, record everything we find, and deliver the video — same day. We don't sell repairs.

story.headline: The $8,000 Kink
story.body: A plumber diagnosed our founder's slow drain as corroded cast iron pipes — full sewer line replacement, $8,000. A camera inspection revealed the real cause: a flexible hose under the standing tub, kinked because it was installed three inches too long. A handyman fixed it for under $200. That's why ClearScope exists — because a camera shows you what's actually there, not what someone hopes to sell you.
story.footnote: The handyman charged $180. It's Tuesday in this industry.

howItWorks.headline: What $149 gets you
howItWorks.step1Body: Same-day or next-day appointments in North Miami Beach.
howItWorks.step2Body: Our camera traverses up to 200ft of sewer line. Zero damage to landscaping.
howItWorks.step3Body: Full inspection video delivered to your Google Drive. Yours to keep, share with any plumber, or file with your insurance claim.

form.disclaimer: No payment required. Unsubscribe anytime. Your information is never shared.
form.successBodyLive: We'll reach out to confirm your appointment in North Miami Beach.

benefits.priorityBody: First on the list gets first appointment slots when we open for bookings.
benefits.rateBody: Early signups are locked at $149 — the lowest ClearScope will ever charge.
benefits.obligationBody: No payment to sign up. You book and pay only when you're ready.

commercial.headline: Restaurants. HOAs. Property Managers.
commercial.body: ClearScope Commercial offers documented pipe inspections for DERM compliance, insurance claims, and property due diligence. Starting at $275.

faq.headline: Questions
faq.q1: WHEN WILL YOU START TAKING APPOINTMENTS?
faq.a1: We're validating demand in North Miami Beach now. Once we confirm enough interest, we'll announce our launch date to everyone on the waitlist — you'll be first to know and first to book.
faq.q2: DO I HAVE TO PAY TO SIGN UP?
faq.a2: No. Joining the waitlist is completely free. You only pay when you book an actual inspection. There's no commitment and you can unsubscribe anytime.
faq.a3: Because we only do one thing. Plumbers charge $300–$500 for a camera inspection because they're hoping to sell you a repair on the same visit. We're not hoping to sell you anything. That's worth something.
faq.q4: DO YOU FIX THE PIPES YOU FIND PROBLEMS IN?
faq.a4: No. ClearScope is a diagnostic service, not a plumbing contractor. We put a camera in your pipe and show you what's there — we don't touch, cut, or repair anything. Think of us like a medical imaging center: we provide the scan. You decide what to do next.

finalCta.headline: KNOW WHAT'S IN YOUR PIPES BEFORE YOUR PLUMBER DOES.

booking.step1: You'll receive a reminder 24 hours before your inspection.
booking.step2: Your tech arrives in a marked vehicle with ClearScope ID.
booking.step3: Your full inspection video arrives within 4 hours of the inspection.
